values.value: Fires when an active OauthToken references a connected app (AppMenuItem.ApplicationId) that is not present in OAuth_App_Inventory__c. Tokens against un-cataloged apps indicate a user-driven grant to software that the security team has never reviewed.

Identify the application from the payload, contact the subject user to confirm the grant was intentional and business-justified, and either add the app to the OAuth inventory after review or revoke the OauthToken via Setup > Connected Apps OAuth Usage. Repeat for each token tied to the same application.
